description: User scrolls horizontally through the 'Short tasks' carousel, moving from the 'AI Interview' card to a 'Survey' card.
frame_description: The 'AI Interview' card is replaced by a 'Survey' card as the user scrolls right.

description: User pauses to view the 'Survey' card in the 'Short tasks' section.

description: User scrolls horizontally through the 'Short tasks' carousel again, moving from the pink 'Survey' card to a yellow 'Survey' card.
